summary: Kartu Stok MODE FILTER feature test COMPLETE - 11/11 backend tests PASSED, UI verified working. Fixed critical bug in /api/inventory/stock-card endpoint that was not finding movements due to missing $or pattern for product_id/item_id.

fixed.issue: Berdasarkan Periode mode not finding movements - query used 'item_id' but stock_movements collection has 'product_id'
fixed.fix: Added $or pattern to query both product_id and item_id for backward compatibility

fixed.issue: Transaction type label showing '-' instead of proper label
fixed.fix: Updated to check multiple type fields: transaction_type, movement_type, type, reference_type

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ KartuStok.jsx: MODE FILTER toggle implemented correctly with 2 options
✅ 'Semua Periode (Stok Saat Ini)' is DEFAULT mode with green color
✅ 'Berdasarkan Periode' mode shows amber color and reveals month/year selects
✅ stock-card-modal endpoint correctly uses $or pattern for backward compatibility
✅ stock-card endpoint now fixed to use $or pattern
✅ Both modes show consistent balance=18 for item 001002
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kartu Stok page now has MODE FILTER toggle. 'Semua Periode' mode uses /api/inventory/stock-card-modal and 'Berdasarkan Periode' mode uses /api/inventory/stock-card with month/year params. Both endpoints now correctly use $or pattern for product_id/item_id compatibility.

test_08_period_mode_shows_transactions.detail: Period mode shows 2 movements including stock opname

test_11_daftar_item_stock_matches.detail: Daftar Item stock=18 matches Kartu Stok

details: Toggle between 'Semua Periode (Stok Saat Ini)' and 'Berdasarkan Periode'
Default mode is 'Semua Periode' with green color
'Berdasarkan Periode' shows amber color and reveals month/year filters
Process button text changes based on mode

line_changes.change: Added more transaction types: opname_in, opname_out, purchase_receive, quick_purchase, etc.

line_changes.after: mov.get('transaction_type') or mov.get('movement_type') or mov.get('type') or mov.get('reference_type') or ''
